_meta.matrix: 11 / 20 — Memory retrieval surfaces correct prior event
_meta.notes: Memories with high similarity × entity-overlap × recency to current input must show up in NarrateInput.relevantMemories and influence narration. Setup primes one specific memory; the input intentionally references it. Test asserts narration text contains a recall phrase ('again', 'before', 'last time', 'remember'). Day-10 implementation; this scenario is the smoke test.

events.summary: The pool in the dripping cavern tastes of rust, oil, and a thin sour note. You should not drink here.
